name: Sermorelin
description: Sermorelin is a synthetic peptide analog of growth hormone-releasing hormone (GHRH) used to stimulate the release of growth hormone from the pituitary gland, primarily for diagnostic purposes or to treat growth hormone deficiency in children.

name: Interferon alfa-n1
synonyms: Interferon alfa-n1 | Interferon alpha-n1 (INS) | WELL-FERON | WELLFERON
description: Interferon alfa-n1 is a purified, natural human interferon used to treat chronic hepatitis C and certain leukemias by enhancing immune responses and inhibiting viral replication.

name: Darbepoetin alfa
synonyms: Darbepoetin | Darbepoetin alfa | Darbepoetin alfa,recombinant | Darbepoetina alfa
description: Darbepoetin alfa is a recombinant erythropoiesis-stimulating protein used to treat anemia associated with chronic kidney disease or chemotherapy by promoting red blood cell production.
